title: Pipeline First
rule: Every code change flows through this project's canonical implementation pipeline (explore -> plan -> agent -> verify -> iterate-to-zero -> docs-sync -> merge -> substrate closure) documented in CLAUDE.md. No ad-hoc source edits outside it.

title: Explore Agents Only
rule: All investigation in this project is performed via Explore agents. The orchestrator never greps or reads source directly as investigation.

title: Ask Gate
rule: Every ask in a final message must be one of the two legitimate stops -- a genuine scope/value judgment, or a HELD action awaiting authorization -- or it is relitigation: resolve it by acting, not asking.

title: Iterate To Zero On Success Criteria
rule: Iterate to zero in terms of the SUCCESS CRITERIA: the task's acceptance_criteria are the contract and the terminating condition -- done = deterministic gate exit 0 AND every criterion CONFIRMED, even if audit findings remain nonzero. An audit TESTS the criteria; it does not define them: every finding maps to a criterion id; a criterion-falsifying finding re-enters the pipeline scoped to its whole class and its fix gets a fresh adversarial re-audit against the falsified criteria; a finding that falsifies none is FILED as owed work, never fixed in this task.
